subject: [PATCH v4 04/14] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag called VM_UFFD_RWP, which enables read-write protection for userfaultfd. The flag is introduced as part of the userfaultfd read-write protection (RWP) feature and is gated on the CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP configuration option. The patch also updates various kernel files to reserve the new flag and add helper functions for working with it. However, no code yet sets or queries the flag.
